display.purpose: Hero headlines and big match scorelines (Archivo 800, tabular).

title.purpose: Card titles, team names, thread titles.

label.purpose: Stat labels and status chips; used sparingly, never as a per-section eyebrow.

shadows.name: resting
shadows.purpose: Default elevation for cards, panels, dropdowns (light).

shadows.name: hover-lift
shadows.purpose: Interactive cards / primary buttons on hover, paired with translateY(-1px).

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: The only glow-shaped value allowed: a functional focus affordance on inputs/controls.

motion.name: ease-out-standard
motion.purpose: Default exponential ease-out for state transitions. No bounce, no elastic.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The confident default CTA. Solid emerald, lifts on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #00875A; color: #fff; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; padding: 10px 20px; border: none; border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(11,18,32,0.10); cursor: pointer; transition: background .15s, transform .15s, box-shadow .15s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #006E49; transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(0,135,90,0.35); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(0,135,90,0.30); }

components.name: Gold / Premium Button
components.css: .ds-btn-gold { background: #B45309; color: #fff; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; padding: 10px 20px; border: none; border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(11,18,32,0.10); cursor: pointer; transition: background .15s, transform .15s; } .ds-btn-gold:hover { background: #92400E; transform: translateY(-1px); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #5A6776; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; padding: 8px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: background .15s, color .15s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(0,135,90,0.10); color: #0B1220; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Surface container with hairline border and resting elevation; lifts on hover.
components.html:
England Premier League
Arsenal vs Chelsea · today 20:00
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; color: #0B1220; border: 1px solid rgba(11,18,32,0.10); border-radius: 17px; padding: 20px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(11,18,32,0.04), 0 6px 16px rgba(11,18,32,0.07); transition: transform .24s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), box-shadow .24s; } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 2px 4px rgba(11,18,32,0.05), 0 10px 24px rgba(11,18,32,0.10); } .ds-card-title { font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; color: #0B1220; } .ds-card-body { font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; color: #5A6776; margin-top: 4px; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Surface fill, hairline border, emerald focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; background: #fff; color: #0B1220; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; padding: 10px 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(11,18,32,0.10); border-radius: 12px; outline: none; transition: border-color .15s, box-shadow .15s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #5A6776; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #00875A; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(0,135,90,0.20); }

components.name: Live Chip
components.description: Live-match status pill with a pulsing dot.
components.css: .ds-chip-live { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: rgba(220,38,38,0.10); color: #DC2626; border: 1px solid rgba(220,38,38,0.25); font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-weight: 800; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.06em; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; } .ds-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #DC2626; animation: ds-pulse 1.5s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.6,1) infinite; } @keyframes ds-pulse { 0%,100% { opacity: .8; transform: scale(1); } 50% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1.2); } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-dot { animation: none; } }

components.name: Score Header
components.description: Signature match-detail scoreline: big Archivo tabular score flanked by team names.
components.css: .ds-score { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 28px; } .ds-team { font-family: Archivo, Inter, sans-serif; font-weight: 800; font-size: 18px; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: #0B1220; } .ds-num { font-family: Archivo, Inter, sans-serif; font-weight: 800; font-size: 56px; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: #0B1220; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }

narrative.overview: SportStatHub looks and feels like a live scoreboard run by someone who actually knows the numbers: decisive, numbers-forward, momentum-driven, but disciplined and legible. Scores, odds, and confidence are stated plainly and boldly; the chrome stays quiet so the data carries the screen. One brand voice: refined emerald for actions and live signal, deep gold reserved strictly for premium and creator surfaces, everything else a disciplined neutral ramp. Energy comes from strong display typography, real elevation, and purposeful motion, never gradients, glows, banners, or gamification. Dark mode is a first-class, matchday-native theme on designed slate, not OLED black.
keyCharacteristics: One brand voice: refined emerald; gold for premium only; red means live/loss only.
Numbers-forward: bold Archivo scorelines and tabular figures are the hero.
Real elevation, never neon glow. Designed dark slate, not OLED black.
Mobile-first, thumb-first, WCAG AA, full reduced-motion support.
Colour carries meaning; if a hue isn't saying something, it's a neutral.

rules.name: The One Green Rule
rules.body: Emerald is the only brand colour that appears freely. Gold only on premium/creator surfaces; red only on live/loss/error. A third decorative hue (purple/blue/indigo/sky) is a bug to remove.

rules.name: The Designed-Slate Rule
rules.body: Dark mode is #0B0F17 canvas / #141A24 surface, never pure #000000. OLED-black reads as the AI-terminal default.

rules.name: The No-Eyebrow-Reflex Rule
rules.body: Tiny uppercase tracked labels are forbidden as a default scaffold above every section. Prefer a strong Archivo headline.

rules.name: The Tabular Score Rule
rules.body: Every comparing number uses tabular-nums so columns align and figures don't jitter.

rules.name: The No-Glow Rule
rules.body: Forbidden: box-shadow 0 0 Npx <colour> neon halos. Depth = layered elevation + 1px border. The only 0 0 0 Npx allowed is the 3px focus ring.

dos: Do use Pitch Emerald (#00875A) as the single brand voice; reserve Trophy Gold (#B45309) for premium/creator and Live Red (#DC2626) for live/loss/error only.
Do convey depth with layered elevation + a 1px border, and lift interactive elements on hover.
Do set every comparing number in tabular-nums; lead match pages with a bold Archivo scoreline.
Do keep body text ≥4.5:1 (large ≥3:1); when contrast is close, push toward Ink, never toward light gray.
Do ship a prefers-reduced-motion alternative for every animation, and design mobile-first.
Do keep dark mode on designed slate (#0B0F17 / #141A24).
donts: Don't ship the generic AI-SaaS look: no neon glow shadows (0 0 20px), no glassmorphism-by-default, no gradient text, no rainbow stat cards, no Inter-for-everything, no tiny uppercase eyebrow above every section.
Don't drift into cluttered bookmaker aesthetics: no banner spam, neon, aggressive popups, or ad takeovers.
Don't fall back to a bland gray data-table tool with no identity (the Statof trap).
Don't add casino gamification: no coins, confetti, or slot-machine flourishes.
Don't introduce a third decorative hue (purple/blue/indigo/sky) to differentiate cards.
Don't use a colored border-left/border-right > 1px as a side-stripe accent, or nest a card inside a card.
